"https://www.suse.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-39821"}], "notes": [{"category": "general", "text": "The ToASCII and ToUnicode functions incorrectly accept Punycode-encoded labels that decode to an ASCII-only label. For example, ToUnicode(\"xn--example-.com\") incorrectly returns the name \"example.com\" rather than an error. This behavior can lead to privilege escalation in programs using the idna package. For example, a program which performs privilege checks on the ASCII hostname may reject \"example.com\" but permit \"xn--example-.com\". If that program subsequently converts the ASCII hostname to Unicode, it will inadvertently permits access to the Unicode name \"example.com\".", "title": "CVE description"}], "product_status":
